scenario.name: Dialog Manual PRACK UAS-side Failure UAS
scenario.send: SIP/2.0 100 Trying Via:[$hdr_via] From:[$hdr_from] To:[$hdr_to];tag=[service].[call_number] [last_Call-ID:] CSeq:[$hdr_cseq] Contact: <sip:[local_ip]:[local_port]> Content-Length: 0
SIP/2.0 180 Ringing Via:[$hdr_via] From:[$hdr_from] To:[$hdr_to];tag=[service].[call_number] [last_Call-ID:] CSeq:[$hdr_cseq] Contact: <sip:[local_ip]:[local_port]> Content-Length: 0
SIP/2.0 487 Request Terminated Via:[$hdr_via] From:[$hdr_from] To:[$hdr_to];tag=[service].[call_number] [last_Call-ID:] CSeq:[$hdr_cseq] Contact: <sip:[local_ip]:[local_port]> Content-Length: 0
